label: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning

node.label: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning
node.definition: Neural learning is constrained or augmented by logic, programs, equations, or known physical structure.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning is to connect Supervised learning, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas to downstream capabilities including Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Neuro-symbolic models.
examples: substrate for Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas.

dependencies.rationale: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
